programs.title: Foreign Correspondent
programs.desc: As world news continues to dominate our headlines, Foreign Correspondent brings you an action-packed season of stories reflecting the times in which we live. (Midseason Final).

programs.title: Judgment: Cases That Changed Australia
programs.desc: An unlikely hero takes on laws that silence citizens and reignites a democratic struggle older than the nation itself. (Final).

programs.title: You Can't Ask That
programs.desc: You Can't Ask That asks gambling addicts the awkward, inappropriate or uncomfortable questions you've always wanted to know the answers to, but never had the guts to ask.

programs.title: Compass
programs.desc: Ukrainian vet, Maria Mykytiuk, lived an idyllic life until Russia invaded her home of Bucha in 2022. She survived violence and the death of her best friend. Now Maria is safe in Australia, and using her voice to help Ukraine.

programs.title: ABC Late News
programs.desc: End your day with the latest on the day's top stories. ABC News has reporters across Australia and around the globe to uncover what's happening and why it matters. Presented by Jade Barker in Perth.

programs.title: The Business
programs.desc: Kirsten Aiken and The Business team break down today's RBA decision on interest rates and the RBA Governor's statement. What does it mean for consumers, business and the economy one week out from the Federal Budget?
